zh.Nassau, , Rheinland-Pfalz, Duitsland: 德國海藍-普法爾茲海-拉-可萊斯納斯奧
zh.lifeSummary: 當Liutgardis von Nassau於1172年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲海-拉-可萊斯納斯奧時，她的父親Walram von Nassau I27歲，母親Kunigunde von Ziegenhain24歲。她於大約1199年與Gebhardt IV. von Querfurt Magdeburg結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1222年在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 麥延-可布倫維爾包格享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Liutgardis von Nassau于1172年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲海-拉-可萊斯納斯奧时，她的父亲Walram von Nassau I27岁，母亲Kunigunde von Ziegenhain24岁。她于大约1199年与Gebhardt IV. von Querfurt Magdeburg结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1222年在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 麥延-可布倫維爾包格享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Nassau
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, Dutch, and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Nassau, formerly the seat of an independent duchy. The placename derives from Old High German naz ‘damp, wet’ + ouwa ‘water meadow’.

History: The royal house of Nassau traces its descent from Dudo, Count of Lauenburg, who flourished between 1093 and 1117. His family acquired the county of Nassau in the 12th century. Prince Willem van Oranje-Nassau, otherwise known as William the Silent (1533–84), was the leader of the Dutch revolt against Spain in the 16th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Liutgardis von Nassau was born in 1172, in Nassau, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, her father, Walram von Nassau I, was 27 and her mother, Kunigunde von Ziegenhain, was 24. She married Gebhardt IV. von Querfurt Magdeburg about 1199. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1222, in Virneburg, Mayen-Koblenz, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Liutgardis von Nassau est née en 1172, à Nassau, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Walram von Nassau I, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Kunigunde von Ziegenhain, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Gebhardt IV. von Querfurt Magdeburg environ 1199. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1222, à Virneburg, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Liutgardis von Nassau 1172 in Nassau, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walram von Nassau I 27 und ihre Mutter Kunigunde von Ziegenhain 24. Sie hat um 1199 Gebhardt IV. von Querfurt Magdeburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1222 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Virneburg, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Liutgardis von Nassau è nata il nel 1172 nel Nassau, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, sua padre, Walram von Nassau I, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Kunigunde von Ziegenhain, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Gebhardt IV. von Querfurt Magdeburg circa 1199. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1222, nel Virneburg, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Liutgardis von Nassauが1172年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズルヘイン-ラン-クレイスナッサウで生まれた時，父Walram von Nassau Iは27歳，母Kunigunde von Ziegenhainは24歳であった。約1199年にGebhardt IV. von Querfurt Magdeburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1222年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス メイエン-コブレンズバーネブルグで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Liutgardis von Nassau(이)가 1172년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 리이-라-크레이스 나소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walram von Nassau I(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Kunigunde von Ziegenhain(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1199년 Gebhardt IV. von Querfurt Magdeburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1222년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 메이-코블렌즈 버니버그에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Liutgardis von Nassau nasceu em 1172, em Nassau, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Walram von Nassau I, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Kunigunde von Ziegenhain, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Gebhardt IV. von Querfurt Magdeburg aproximadamente 1199. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1222, em Virneburg, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Liutgardis von Nassau родилась в 1172 г. в местности нассау, раин-лахн-крис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, её отцу по имени Walram von Nassau I было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Kunigunde von Ziegenhain, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gebhardt IV. von Querfurt Magdeburg около 1199 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1222 г. в местности вирнебург, ландкрис меиен-кобленц, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Liutgardis von Nassau nació en 1172, en Nassau, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Walram von Nassau I, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Kunigunde von Ziegenhain, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Gebhardt IV. von Querfurt Magdeburg aproximadamente 1199. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1222, en Virneburg, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 50 años.
